energy_state.name: Energy-State Economy
energy_state.description: Value is tied to measurable energy production and storage; favors industrial output and raw-material throughput.

consciousness_labor.name: Consciousness-Labor Economy
consciousness_labor.description: Cognitive processing cycles are the primary unit of value; minds contribute to distributed tasks at scale.

memory_economy.name: Memory Economy
memory_economy.description: Experience and narrative are stored, traded, and embedded as economic capital; cultural richness drives growth.

time_economy.name: Time Economy
time_economy.description: Lifespan, attention, and temporal positioning are traded directly, giving precise control over productivity.

probability_economy.name: Probability Economy
probability_economy.description: Futures markets trade likelihood of outcomes; strong predictive optimization but reflexivity risk.

ritualized_exchange.name: Ritualized Exchange
ritualized_exchange.description: Exchange is embedded in ceremony and cultural meaning, building deep trust and social cohesion.

consensus_field.name: Consensus Field Governance
consensus_field.description: Aggregated emotional and cognitive states form a shared decision field; deep alignment, but slow to act.

algorithmic_legitimacy.name: Algorithmic Legitimacy
algorithmic_legitimacy.description: Authority derived from performance metrics; efficient and adaptive but dependent on metric trust.

oracle_mediated.name: Oracle-Mediated Governance
oracle_mediated.description: Decisions interpreted through predictive or etheric systems; high strategic foresight, opaque process.

temporal_layer.name: Temporal Layer Governance
temporal_layer.description: Different time-phase populations govern different domains in parallel; powerful but prone to coordination gaps.

distributed_sovereignty.name: Distributed Micro-Sovereignty
distributed_sovereignty.description: Authority distributed to individuals and nodes; maximum autonomy but fragmentation risk.

consciousness_swarm.name: Consciousness Swarm Deliberation
consciousness_swarm.description: Minds temporarily merge for decision-making; highest-quality decisions at psychological cost.

resonance_cohesion.name: Resonance-Based Cohesion
resonance_cohesion.description: Groups form around shared emotional or etheric frequency; rapid coordination within groups.

memory_pooled.name: Memory-Pooled Identity
memory_pooled.description: Shared memory archives maintain continuity and accelerate knowledge transfer across the population.

distributed_selfhood.name: Distributed Selfhood
distributed_selfhood.description: Consciousness spreads across multiple nodes; resilient and parallel but identity fragmentation is a risk.

narrative_bound.name: Narrative-Bound Societies
narrative_bound.description: A shared story defines roles and meaning; strong purpose and cohesion, fragile if the narrative fails.

rotating_embodiment.name: Rotating Embodiment Systems
rotating_embodiment.description: Consciousness moves between bodies, cultivating cross-species empathy at the cost of identity stability.

symbiotic_networks.name: Symbiotic Social Networks
symbiotic_networks.description: Individuals exist in bonded pairs or groups; high stability and efficiency through mutual dependency.
